description: Gate-order shuffle ablation: random commutation-preserving permutation (SHUFFLED) vs ORIGINAL listing vs WCL (wire-consecutive listing) under Phase-1 (GreedyGateCancellation) and Phase-2a (CommutationRewriter). Tests whether listing-model sensitivity is an artifact of random gate placement rather than circuit structure.
notes: canonical_data_file backfilled by wave-1 data-integrity normalization (20260720-230058); see data/DATA_CANONICAL.md for the canonical-file policy.
git_commit not recorded at generation time (pre-provenance era); left null.

source_file pointed into experiments/outputs/, which held uncurated run outputs; the file was archived to _agent_work/orphan_outputs/ during wave-1 data-integrity cleanup. The canonical dataset is the CSV in this directory.
